semantic_description: Copies a null-terminated character sequence from src to dst using an unbounded while loop with an explicit break on src[i] == 0. The contract owns both CharArray buffers of length n + 1, requires the first n source characters to be nonzero and the last source character to be 0, preserves src, and updates dst so it contains the same prefix l followed by the terminating 0. The loop writes dst one character at a time and must handle the n == 0 case by immediately writing only the terminator.
